items.title: NEW: Pacers were quiet to start free agency, limited by what they could offer. On Day 2, they addressed a need by adding Kelly Oubre Jr. — a wing with size, scoring, and an edge for the bench unit.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
NEW: Pacers were quiet to start free agency, limited by what they could offer. On Day 2, they addressed a need by adding Kelly Oubre Jr. — a wing with size, scoring, and an edge for the bench unit.

It pushes them into the tax and near the first apron.

www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/pacers-kel...

media.title: Pacers add Kelly Oubre Jr. to address need on the wing
media.description: Oubre gives Indiana size, scoring and bench help on the perimeter as the Pacers move into the luxury tax and near the first apron.

items.title: The Toronto Blue Jays were third in the AL in walks last year with 520 in the regular season.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
The Toronto Blue Jays were third in the AL in walks last year with 520 in the regular season.

This year? 239 (right now). 

That's No. 15 and last in the AL.
